backstory.original: The Black Viper was a notorious burglar, pickpocket, mugger, and assassin who died a century ago, after a long and nefarious career. Esvele Rosznar, a brash young noble, has recently adopted the Black Viper's persona to lead a secret life of crime. Like many other nobles, Esvele gossips about the Black Viper's exploits to lend credence to the villain's mystique.
backstory.display: 漆黑毒蛇是一个臭名昭著的窃贼、扒手、抢劫犯和刺客，在经历漫长而邪恶的职业生涯后，于一个世纪前死去。艾斯薇尔·罗斯纳，一个傲慢的年轻贵族，最近利用起漆黑毒蛇的身份，开始了秘密的犯罪生活。像许多其他贵族一样，艾斯韦尔对漆黑毒蛇的事迹添油加醋，增加这个恶棍的神秘感。

description.original: Black Viper attacks a random enemy with her daggers.
description.display: 漆黑毒蛇用她的匕首攻击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Black Viper throws down a massive smokescreen, hindering enemies and helping herself.
description.display: 漆黑毒蛇丢出一枚巨大的烟雾弹，阻碍敌人并协助自己。

longDescription.original: Black Viper creates a smokescreen, reducing damage done to the formation and causing all of her attacks to be Sneak Attacks.
longDescription.display: 漆黑毒蛇制造一片烟雾，降低阵型受到的伤害，并使自己的所有攻击变为偷袭。

conditions.desc: Adds a 33% chance that a Red Gem will drop from a boss loot sack. Each Red Gem collected in the current adventure grants a  12.5% damage bonus stacking multiplicatively. Each Red Gem collected across all adventures permanently unlocks additional bonuses.

Adds a 25% chance that a Red Gem will drop from a boss loot sack. Each Red Gem collected in the current adventure grants a  10% damage bonus stacking multiplicatively. Each Red Gem collected across all adventures permanently unlocks additional bonuses.
首领战利品口袋中出现红宝石的机率增加 33%。每颗在当前冒险途中获得的红宝石赋予 12.5% 伤害加成（以乘算方式堆叠）。在所有冒险中获得的每颗红宝石都可以解锁永久性的额外加成。
首领战利品口袋中出现的红宝石机率增加 25%。每颗在当前冒险途中获得的红宝石赋予 10% 伤害加成（以乘算方式堆叠）。在所有冒险中获得的每颗红宝石都可以解锁永久性的额外加成。

tipText.original: Black Viper powers up over time by collecting Red Gems. Red Gems have both a permanent effect that persists between runs and a damage bonus that applies to the current run.
tipText.display: 漆黑毒蛇通过收集红色宝石来强化自身。红色宝石既有贯穿全程的永久性效果，也有仅作用于当前关卡的伤害加成。

conditions.desc: Black Viper deals $amount% more damage the first or second time she attacks an enemy. Black Viper attacks 0.5s faster after she Sneak Attacks.
Black Viper deals $amount% more damage the first time she attacks an enemy.
漆黑毒蛇的第一次或第二次攻击伤害提高 $amount%。在施放偷袭后，漆黑毒蛇的攻击速度加快 0.5 秒。
漆黑毒蛇的第一次攻击伤害提高 $amount%。
All positional Formation Abilities $target receives from Warlocks, Rangers, Rogues, and Bards are buffed by $amount%.
All positional Formation Abilities $target receives from Rogues and Bards are buffed by $amount%.
由邪术师、巡林客、游荡者和吟游诗人施加给$target的所有阵型技能强化 $amount%。
由游荡者和吟游诗人施加给$target的所有阵型技能强化 $amount%。

tipText.original: Black Viper is buffed more effectively by Bards, Rogues, and eventually Rangers and Warlocks. Build a formation with those classes to make the best use of her.
tipText.display: 吟游诗人和游荡者，直到巡林客和邪术师会让漆黑毒蛇的增益更强。构建阵型时加入这些职业，从而充分利用她的天赋。

conditions.desc: When other Champions are attacked, Black Viper deals +200% more damage on her next attack. Stacks up to 10 times additively.
When other Champions are attacked, Black Viper deals +100% more damage on her next attack. Stacks up to 5 times additively.
当其他勇士被攻击时，漆黑毒蛇的下次攻击提升 200% 伤害。可以加算方式叠加最多 10 次。
当其他勇士被攻击时，漆黑毒蛇的下次攻击提升 100% 伤害。可以加算方式叠加最多 5 次。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"add_sneak_attack_hit,1","description":"Black Viper can Sneak Attack enemies on her first TWO attacks against them, and she attacks 0.5s faster after she Sneak Attacks."}

specializationDescription.original: Black Viper is one with the shadows and can Sneak Attack more often; she attacks faster when she does.
specializationDescription.display: 漆黑毒蛇化身暗影使者，偷袭次数增加，并且攻击速度更快。

description.desc: Increases the drop chance for Red Gems to 33% and increases the current adventure damage bonus by 2.5% per gem.
使红宝石掉落几率提高 33% ，且每颗红宝石使当前冒险的伤害加成提高 2.5%。

specializationDescription.original: Black Viper has a keen eye for valuables and will collect more Red Gems and increase their effectiveness.
specializationDescription.display: 漆黑毒蛇拥有高超的贵重物品鉴别能力，可以收集更多红色宝石，并强化其效果。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,2109","description":"Increases the bonus damage of Sneak Attack by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,2109","description":"Increases the bonus damage of Sneak Attack by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,2109","description":"Increases the bonus damage of Sneak Attack by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,2109","description":"Increases the bonus damage of Sneak Attack by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,2109","description":"Increases the bonus damage of Sneak Attack by 100%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,2109","description":"Increases the bonus damage of Sneak Attack by 100%"}

description.original: If I did brawl in a tavern, my enemies would never see me.
description.display: 如果我在酒馆里打架，我的敌人根本看不到我。

description.original: I aim to disarm my foes before they taste my blade.
description.display: 我的目标是，在敌人尝到我的利刃前就解除他们的武装。

description.original: You would expect such skill from someone like me.
description.display: 你要知道，只有我这样的人才能有这种技巧。

description.original: I steal from the rich and give to the poor.
Without us, Waterdeep would have been reduced to rubble.
description.display: 没有我们，深水城早就成了废墟。

description.original: All of this leather armor has really helped my cardio.
description.display: 这些皮甲确实对我的心肺功能有所帮助。

description.original: Forget the chest, come check out the bookshelf!
description.display: 别理那些箱子了，先过来瞧瞧这个书柜！

character_sheet_details.backstory: The Black Viper was a notorious burglar, pickpocket, mugger, and assassin who died a century ago, after a long and nefarious career. Esvele Rosznar, a brash young noble, has recently adopted the Black Viper's persona to lead a secret life of crime. Like many other nobles, Esvele gossips about the Black Viper's exploits to lend credence to the villain's mystique.
character_sheet_details.system_description: The Black Viper is a pure dps champion, with massive damage bonuses to those she hasn't previously attacked.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 漆黑毒蛇是一个臭名昭著的窃贼、扒手、抢劫犯和刺客，在经历漫长而邪恶的职业生涯后，于一个世纪前死去。艾斯薇尔·罗斯纳，一个傲慢的年轻贵族，最近利用起漆黑毒蛇的身份，开始了秘密的犯罪生活。像许多其他贵族一样，艾斯韦尔对漆黑毒蛇的事迹添油加醋，增加这个恶棍的神秘感。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 漆黑毒蛇是纯输出型勇士，会对她尚未攻击过的敌人造成巨额伤害加成。
